_comment: multi-cc-im hooks template — replace ABS_PATH with the absolute path to your multi-cc-im checkout. After editing, merge the `hooks` block into ~/.claude/settings.json (cc reads from there). Schema follows cc upstream: `hooks` is an object keyed by event name, each event maps to an array of matcher groups (with their own inner `hooks` array of handlers). https://code.claude.com/docs/en/hooks. The 3 events are needed: SessionStart sets up paneToSession map; Stop carries the assistant reply into the bridge router for forwarding to WeChat; SessionEnd drives PaneAlive graceful-exit signal. Earlier versions subscribed to UserPromptSubmit / PreToolUse / PostToolUse for analytics — those have been dropped because cc's own transcript jsonl (~/.claude/projects/<dir>/<sid>.jsonl) already records that data. Easier path: run `./bin/multi-cc-im setup-hooks` instead of editing this by hand. See README.md Quick Start step 4 for context.
